title: Life-first integration: wire select_steps into user-facing paths
description: Commit 66785ce added select_steps() to gateway/next_step.py but did not wire it into the rendered brief or Home 'What's Next' card. This packet completes LF-01 by integrating life-first ordering into the actual user-facing paths and adding integration coverage. It does not reimplement select_steps().

packets.title: Wire life-first ordering into brief and What's Next
packets.objective: Carry forward the select_steps() implementation from 66785ce. Change gateway/brief.py:get_next_steps_section() to use next_step.select_steps(). Add GET /projects/next-steps returning select_steps(). Update the Home 'What's Next' card to fetch from this endpoint. Add integration tests proving brief and route output follow life-first ordering, cap self-development when life steps exist, and preserve only-code behavior. Do not reimplement select_steps().
acceptance_criteria: Integration tests cover life-before-code, self-dev cap when life present, and only-code unchanged behavior
npm run build in gateway/kitty-chat passes
